name: scenario-1-fix-works
description: Realistic p99 alert. Let Claude propose a fix. Verifier should PASS the timeout patch.

alert.title: [p99 high] checkout latency above SLO
alert.event_msg: Monitor 'checkout.p99.latency' triggered. p99 over the last 10 minutes is 1,420ms; SLO is 300ms. Error rate is 0% — requests are completing but slow. Downstream pricing service is the suspected bottleneck.
